first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. Both assign the same very low score (1/10) and provide the same core reasoning: the candidate lacks the mandatory Japanese language proficiency and the required technical skills in embedded C programming and networking. The minor differences in phrasing across the justification, strengths, and concerns are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and show no connection to the change in location from Berlin to San Francisco.
